# CLAUDE.md — trending-repo

Flask web app + daily scraper that fetches GitHub trending repos and displays them.

## CRITICAL — DO NOT EDIT UNLESS TASK IS EXPLICIT
- `app.py` — Flask routes and rendering logic
- `fetch_trending.py` — GitHub trending scraper

## Rules
- Never add/remove import statements to app.py or fetch_trending.py — last time this broke the code
- Never modify the import block at the top of either file
- The data pipeline (data/*.json) is auto-generated by cron — do not edit manually

## Commands
- Syntax: `python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('app.py').read()); ast.parse(open('fetch_trending.py').read())"`
- Test: no test suite — validate with syntax check only
- Push: `git push origin main` (main branch, rebase first)
